$note: inline-sizing (line-length) properties a ch measure applies to; false-friends (stroke-width, border-image-width, contain-intrinsic-*) excluded

properties.name: column-width
properties.appliesTo: block containers except table wrapper boxes

properties.name: max-width
properties.appliesTo: all elements that accept width or height

properties.name: min-width
properties.appliesTo: all elements that accept width or height
